text: Every device in, upon, or by which any person or property is or may be transported or drawn upon a highway, except devices moved by human power or used exclusively upon stationary rails or tracks.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 159 — Vehicle

Every device in, upon, or by which any person or property is or may be transported or drawn upon a highway, except devices moved by human power or used exclusively upon stationary rails or tracks.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
